content:
“The Oracle’s prophecy was actually correct, but misunderstood.”
If the rewrite is accepted, it alters how Week 9 plays out.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Gives students a feeling of historical authorship—they shape the game’s narrative.
✔ Adds a delay mechanism—rewrites don’t instantly change reality.
✔ Creates an extra layer of strategic maneuvering.

📌 Final Lock-In Questions for Version 6.7

1. Should the Mid-Semester Chaos Event have multiple challenge options, or should it be fixed each semester?

✔ If multiple, it creates variety but adds complexity.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 352 (chunk 352/555)
